emails.subject: RE: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: RE: American Airlines ISDA I believe credit is trying to decide what to do considering the recent changes in the airlines' positions. To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal)

emails.subject: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: American Airlines ISDA According to credit, the AA ISDA worksheet was sent back to legal last week. Have you seen it or are they throwing me off? Rich Friedman Enron Global Markets LLC richard.friedman@enron.com 713-853-5137
